reviews.review_description: I really really loved this game but I thought it was way to short an hope they add more maps and updates so people get their moneys worth. All things aside it was a very fun experience but I’m still hoping they add a free expansion pack or smt.
Could not make it past the light house
It’s just very hard going from gorilla tag now this and it’s really difficult using one hammer hopefully they make some more levels so I can actually think it’s worth the $6

reviews.review_title: The end of the game is way too hard
reviews.review_description: The end of the game I can’t do it’s so hard and game looks so fun but when I bought it I realised how much of a waste of money it was.   I want a refund.
It’s fun and entertaining but only downside is that my arms are in pain but still very fun
Make like an easy easy mode twin hammers isn’t gonna cut it

reviews.review_title: Good game just way too short
reviews.review_description: This is a great game but it does have a steep learning curve if you're coming from games like gorilla tag that had that same type of movement, then you will be familiar with it and it won't be so bad but if you have never played again where you have to leave with your arms it may be kind of hard that being said I really did like this game I beat it in 2 hours, now there is another game that is very similar to this called crowbar climber and I wish that I would have bought it because it at least has several different levels but he knows maybe this game will get a bunch of updates and we will have multiple levels very soon either way it's very fun and definitely a challenge
The movement is bad, I tried to jump and it sent me backwards, hit box’s bad I tried to jump onto a ledge and I sent me down I will not recommend this, wast of money

I have had only a few bugs because whenever I swing my hammer too hard into the floor it sometimes gets stuck in the floor and I usually just get sent flying but otherwise it is an amazing game. If you are wondering if you wanna buy this game just letting you know it is a lot of work and it takes a while to learn how to play but I really recommend this game to those looking for a challenge. This game needs multiplayer though because my friends made me get this game and I would love to play alongside them 👍👍👍

I honestly have no clue why everyone hates the movement, because it was perfectly fine for me. Took me just over an hour to beat with Heavy hammer and like 30 minutes with Twin hammers. This game was so fun to play through, and I would love to see more updates. And the ending was so peak that a brown tear ran down my leg 🥺

This game looked fun at first, but the beginning is frustrating and overly complicated for new players. The hammers do not feel very effective, and gripping surfaces is difficult because you often just fall off. Overall, the experience was disappointing, and I would not recommend this game.

This is too hard for the average person, I hate leaving bad reviews on games that I think I could get better at over time but with this game it is different. You get stuck in the light house, the game bugs out, and the hammer will no clip through random stuff for no reason. When im bad at a game I try to blame myself as much as I can but in this game you will fail to all the bugs!!! the physics suck and the hamme doesn't follow your hands, when I download this game I was expecting getting over it in vr.... That is not what I got. DONT BUY THIS GAME IF YOU HAVE A LIFE.
This is a good game but can be hard

It looked like a fun game and all but NOPE. I try to just walk around and I literally don’t move, then if I hit ever so slightly harder, I get launched in a RANDOM direction. Don’t even talk about trying to move, I swing forward and I go a COMPLETE other direction. The worst part is that LITERALLY EVERYTHING is either as slippery as ice, or more slippery than ice, like since when were rocks slippery, I gently put my hammer on a rock, move my other one and all the sudden I start slipping off, and that happens on rocks with like a 25 degree angle, even on flat surfaces it feels like I’m ice skating, I’m just slippin around, along with either not moving when you hit or moving faster than the speed of sound when you hit makes the slippery part even worse, either make a setting to turn off slipping, or remove it completely, and also make it reasonable for how hard you hit
i hate how hard this game is.i swear i can't even get past the lighthouse it's so hard why is this game so hard you need to fix your game

reviews.review_title: Why is he hold the hammer like that
reviews.review_description: My biggest problem with this game and the reason why I'm not giving it five stars is because of how awkward the hammer is he holds the hammer in such a way that you sort of have to use it like a pogo stick bouncing yourself forward to where you want to go, it's a way I can't describe but you instantly can tell what I'm talking about once you play the game. I hate it because that way of moving combined with the uneasy terrain means that there are very simple jumps where you can predict where you're going to go and it just doesn't go anywhere you expected. I don't think I could stress this enough I don't mind difficult level design, but only when the level design is fair that's why Bennett fodii version was fun it was absurdly difficult but at the end of the day every fall kind of felt like your fault. But in this version because of the somewhat awkward way you have to maneuver yourself because of the awkward when you hold your Hammer there are times where I fall into the water that I feel like we're 0% my fault having said that I'll still be giving the game four stars because it's mainly a skill issue on my part and if you don't have a problem with the awkward way holding the hammer you will have fun with this game.

While i did beat this game, there was some parts that were js genuinely nearly impossible bcz of the fact its in vr. i think it has potential for sure, but the devs need to put more time into this and making the physics and overall gameplay much better than it is now. i wouldn’t recommend buying the game at its current state, as you most likely wont beat it, especially if you have an older vr, but as the game progresses down the line i think it would be worth your money.

reviews.review_title: Very rage inducing, but in a good way
reviews.review_description:
This game single handedly fills me with the rage of ten thousand suns and the fury of the gods and every day makes me question my entire life’s every choices I have rage quite this game more than every dark souls game put together I have also had full exerstensial break downs from playing this game, all that being said it’s also just a chill game and is pretty fun definitely worth the 7$ would recommend.

Update this game may be the reason I’m in therapy.

Great game. I love the challenge and when it gets too hard so i have to think about solving the problems. Ive had a few bugs but its only 5 pound so its not that bad. It is very rage inducing and i have rage quit several times but in a fun way. If you like a challenge i would definitely recommend this game. Please add multiplayer though that woulld be so fun.
Buggiest game I have ever played, would not recommend, I was almost at the end and i was flung out into space where nothing would happen, I even restarted my game and I was still stuck there.
Every time I use the hammer for anything even to move the edges of the screen focus black making me adjust my eyes each time
The ending in so beautiful with all the clouds and stars and space it was just so beautiful 😍

The game was good overall, but the one thing that gave me a four stars is the textures on the rocks and also the tree bark is kind of like you put an image PNG on an item and also add a day and night cycle to give it a little real life input a little visibility on the water because all I see in the game it’s just floating rocks without any support on any rocks but the game was good over

I love the game i just think it is a little to short and needs some updates so we can go further than we can now. Or. Add new maps and so we have a choice to be in a different place. PLEASE ADD UPDATES

This game is so bad the physics ￼are so bad that every time I tried to jump my hammer got stuck in the ground and also the first part of the game is so difficult that it gives no learning curve and there is no tutorial plus whenever I try to push the ground to go in I go up like two feet and I can’t even pass the first area

I got this game and yes its really hard at first most 1 star reveiws are just people raging but after a week i beat the game for the first time a devestating fail at the snow world now to this day im a speedrunner i have a time of 11 minutes and i reccomend this game if you don't rage to much and its a perfect game except one thing the game should get multiplayer and a wordrobe with custom hammer colors because i heard you get a galaxy hammer at 100 wins and a gold hammer at 50 wins and you should make a leaderboard and a speedrun mode
.       5 STARS

I thought the parkour would be fun but somehow i cant find a single good thing about this game and i just gotta say what was going through your heads when yall made the lighthouse interior parkour? this game has more potential but your gonna have to make the character less iron deficient. id like to see this game get better.

I have just beat the game for the 3rd time, and it doesn't cease to impress me. Sure, the graphics aren't the best graphics ever, and yes, the movements can be quite janky and glitchy at times, but I would still play again and give it a 10/10. Mind you, I play on a quest 2, and it works alright for me. It does take some getting used to, so if you're saying the "movements are un realistic" then yes you're right, as the game revovles around a man in a toilet climbing his way up random obstacles with nothing but a hammer. And don't even get me started on how beautiful the sky is at the end of the game. It actually feels like you're above the world. The game is so good and amazing, and it gives you this exciting rush you can't explain. Not trying to spoil anything but the cutscene at the end of the game is insane. 11/10 game, would play again.

I go to a jump and the hammer hooks on i then proceed to get flung for just simply trying to adjust my hammers position. Gravity shouldn’t be the best working force in any game, but yet you still somehow make it work better than other things like the power you generate in a movement. Fix your game and improve the physics you gimps.

I appreciate the update with checkpoints and twin hammers. Id like to see if im able to get further with the hammers than my regular game but i dont want to lose my progress. Can you please add multiple savefiles? So people can have a load of the regular hammer and a separate load of their twin hammers game. Not to mention some people probably have multiple people in the household who use the headset it would be nice if they could have their own save file. Even with the checkpoints though ive gotten quite good at this game but STILL am stuck at the red girder area above the lighthouse... this is one of my favorite games but Ive tended to veer away from this game because of being stuck for so long at this place.. it just kind of isnt fun anymore.. maybe you could like make some sort of like thing you could possibly get like a launch jump 100 feet button you unlock for every 2 or 3 hours in game.. so if people get stuck for a ridiculously long time it could be a little nudge to help them.
Ragebait

reviews.review_title: It made my blood pressure go high
reviews.review_description: Extremely good game. People that rated it 1 star have a skill issue. (jk maybe) The ending was awesome. Physics might make you go insane but that's the fun of it.

Got this game literally five days ago, and it was so worth it. Definitely is similar to Getting over it, pretty sure that was the idea add more levels, like maybe a secret extra harthough. Beat the game in two days, and replayed it over and over, has so much replay ability. One thing though is that I do wish they couldd level you get after beating it, or maybe a DLC. One idea I have is a mode that's like a mix between the dual hammers and the normal mallet, were it's like one long stick held with two hands, and then mallet ends on both sides, kinda like a dumbbell. 10 out of 10 game, kinda hard to move but once you get used to it, it's fun.

I did have a glitch though were it would randomly snap turn me (I had smooth turn on) and launch me, although I think that may have been my headset and not the game since it did happen a little bit in other games. Great game nonetheless.
Its a good vame but there is not reset button when you fall

reviews.review_title: good for what I played but one thing
reviews.review_description: i was playing it until I got ti the crane. it is impossible to go past the crane with stick drift. there has to be a no turn option

Getting to new areas is awesome movement is a bit annoying but that's how it's meant to be. Lighthouse is annoying but very possible and ending is very weird but like love this game.Also i love the checkpoints. Please add multiplayer and free roam (different games,places,tasks, and more.) Thank you for reading this and please add multiplayer.
I have seen a lot of good for games but this is one of the best games. Although it made me lose my insanity, it was a really good game.

Add multiplayer and Codes

Super Duper fun👍👍👍👍👍👍👍👍👍👍👍👍👍👍👍👍👍👍👍👍👍👍👍

Honestly a very fun game. Lokey has my Adrenalin up when I play 😅. It is a bit tricky to figure out at first but if you can’t you can always return it 🤷‍♂️
I was two stages off of beating the game i jumped off to return to the checkpoint and got launched into space and i had to start a new game terrible would do 0 out of five stars if possible
Good game
I would NOT recommend this game it made me rage and so mad DO NOT PLAY.
It’s pretty fun the hard part for me is the light house

This game is really good and is a fun challenge but can be clunky at times but still overall really good but I think multiplayer would be a great addition to the game. Also half of the reviews are just people who are bad at the game

I… love this game, I can’t describe how much I love this game, the ending was the best, it made me feel like I can do anything and be anything, 5 stars, I actually enjoyed this, keep up the great work developers. 100,000,000,000/5 stars.

I’m about to leave a review based on the look it looks amazing so imma give a five star keep going I know I saw a bad review but who cares I know it will be great so here’s a five star have a blessed day

You have to know what you’re getting into, but if you do and decide to go for it you’ll enjoy this.

It’s quite difficult and with no real checkpoints (there are some bigger areas you can fall onto to retry that section), which means the higher you go the more frightening and exciting it becomes. It also has a very fair price.

I quite enjoyed listening to podcasts and audio books while playing this.


———

Some feedback for the developer:
- the hand switching setting is only available from the main menu, not from the in-game settings menu 
- it’s impossible to jump the same height in the Quest version vs PC, which makes the chair/egg part extremely difficult. I eventually managed by jumping on the egg first, but I’ve seen PC players make that jump in one go with ease and I was putting in a lot more effort. Would be great if this could be fixed.
when ever i try to climb it lantches me and is just bad over all

reviews.review_title: I don't like it but still good work
reviews.review_description: Pponpppoopoocockalot

I’ve been on VR for years and know all about oculus. Had every headset. Let’s continue

The graphics are horrific. The textures, and just overall game is so blurry I thought it was an IPD thing.

The PHYSICS are the most buns mechanics I’ve felt in my VR experience. Going into Bonelab and moving with a hammer would feel better.

It’s doesn’t work how you expect it to at ALL, and this game is SOO apparently a  cash grab. I KNOW the dev does not care. 

If you have the 7 bucks lying around, get it. If not, DONT I AM TELLINGYOU.

THEY DO NOT CARE ABOUT THE GAME, HORRIBLE GRAPHICS, EVEN MORE ATROCIOUS PHYSICS.

Awesome game! It is really fun and don’t know why people hate it. The only thing I would really take out of it is that there is no multiplayer mode, and it is super hard to use single hammer. Other than that, it’s just awesome and a great vr version of getting over it.

So i got past the starting point and have reached the lighthouse, and when i say its impossiblt i mean it. Its not like the first part  were as long as its in reach you can get past any obstacleas long as its in reach, and even if you do fall off you are able to learn from your mistakes. But no for some reason they made it unreasonably hard. Its not like a couple tries hard its like you have to be lucky hard. In the light house ice only made it to were the chair and dresser is because the rock above it is just too wide and there isnt an easier angle or anything that lets you take a different path. And thats if you van get up there because for some reason its really hard to even get above the base of thr rocks. All im saying Is if you cna make that part possible for non sweats then i would highly enjoy that.

This game is so dumb I just bought it and trying to go fast is impossible I put in so much strength and they make it to where it is like a new born baby like are u fr the tree in the beginning it Impossible to climb and no check points so dume one misstate welp looks like u start from the beginning the only good thing is the view of the water but if I keep going on about everything that is bad about this game it will take 2 Days to finish reading my review

the hammer doesn’t move accurately to my hands. Countless times I get kicked off after working so hard Cuz the game bugs out or I glitch through something. There are no checkpoints? What a terribly made game. I enjoy the difficulty, but it’s just a bad game in so many ways

Also, I would like to mention that this game is actually huge. I mean, the tower u climb is like 5000 feet up, and each part of it is tricky in its own unique way :)

Anyway it's 100% worth the 6 bucks.
